basics.name: infraId
basics.label: Deployment name (infraId)
basics.toolTip: Unique lowercase DNS label used in resource names and as the VM's public DNS label. 3-15 chars, start with a letter.

constraints.validationMessage: 3-15 characters, lowercase letters/digits/hyphens, starting with a letter and ending with a letter or digit.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM size
elements.toolTip: Standard_D4s_v6 (4 vCPU / 16 GiB) is the recommended floor.

elements.name: adminUsername
elements.label: Admin username
elements.toolTip: Linux admin username on the VM.

constraints.validationMessage: Lowercase, 3-32 chars, starting with a letter.

elements.name: adminSshPublicKey
elements.label: SSH public key
elements.toolTip: OpenSSH public key authorized for the admin user. Generate one with: ssh-keygen -t ed25519

constraints.validationMessage: Paste an OpenSSH public key, e.g. 'ssh-ed25519 AAAA... user@host'.

elements.name: adminSshCidr
elements.label: Allowed SSH source CIDR
elements.toolTip: CIDR allowed inbound on port 22. Tighten to your VPN/egress block for production.

elements.name: customHostname
elements.label: Custom hostname (optional)
elements.toolTip: Customer-facing FQDN. Leave blank to use the Azure-assigned VM FQDN. Point its DNS A record at the VM's public IP after deployment.

constraints.validationMessage: Leave blank, or enter a valid FQDN like finance-agents.company.com.

elements.name: postgresSkuTier
elements.label: PostgreSQL tier
elements.toolTip: Burstable suits evaluation/low load. Use General Purpose or Memory Optimized for production.

elements.name: postgresSkuName
elements.label: PostgreSQL SKU name
elements.toolTip: Compute SKU name, e.g. Standard_B2s (Burstable) or Standard_D2ads_v5 (General Purpose).

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a SKU name like Standard_B2s.

elements.name: postgresStorageSizeGB
elements.label: PostgreSQL storage
elements.toolTip: Storage size for the database server.
